title: Armpit Apples
script: Imagine going to a dance club, but instead of handing your crush a corsage, you hand them a warm, soggy slice of apple... from your armpit. Believe it or not, in rural Austria and Elizabethan England, this was the ultimate romantic flex. Young, single women would tuck thick slices of sweet apple right into their armpits before a long night of sweaty, vigorous folk dancing. At the end of the night, a woman would approach the man she fancied most and offer him the sweat-soaked fruit. If he bravely ate the entire soggy slice, it meant he accepted her 'personal fragrance' and returned her affection. It was basically a medieval pheromone test. Next time you complain about modern dating apps, just be glad you don't have to evaluate a potential partner by eating their armpit sweat.
